gumoss.pe: While in party, improves logging efficiency by 30~50% and reduces weight of all types of wood by 40~60%. (Does not stack)

hartalis.pe: Can be ridden. While mounted, it generates a barrier that blocks all attacks. Can triple jump while mounted.

helzephyr.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Dark and increases Attack by 5~20%.

helzephyr-lux.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Electric and increases Attack by 5~20%.

herbil.pe: While in party, Herbil uses its healing powers to restore 30~60% of the player's Max Health when incapacitated.

hoocrates.pe: While in party, increases Attack of Dark Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

hoodle.pe: While in party, increases the player's damage dealt to enemies that are not in combat by 50~100%. (Does not stack)

icelyn.pe: When activated, Icelyn changes the player's attack type to Ice and increases Attack by 30~50%.

illuminant-bat.pe: While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

illuminant-slime.pe: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

incineram.pe: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Hellfire Claw. When this Pal uses Hellfire Claw, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier.

incineram-noct.pe: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Nightmare Claw. When this Pal uses Nightmare Claw, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier.

jelliette.pe: While in party, increases items obtained from fishing by 55~95%. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jelliette's watering speed increases by 50~120%. (Does not stack)

jellroy.pe: While in party, increases items obtained from salvaging by 55~95%. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jellroy's watering speed increases by 50~120%. (Does not stack)

jetragon.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

jolthog.pe: When activated, equips Jolthog to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Electric explosion upon impact.

jolthog-cryst.pe: When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Ice explosion upon impact.

jormuntide.pe: Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Soak by 50~65%. (Does not stack)

jormuntide-ignis.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, nullifies lava damage and increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Burn by 50~65%. (Does not stack)

katress.pe: While in party, Neutral Pals drop 40~80% more items when defeated. Also has a 10~50% chance to prevent Pal Sphere consumption when thrown. (Does not stack)

katress-ignis.pe: While at a base, increases the Kindling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

kelpsea.pe: While in party, increases Attack of Water Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Aquatic Pal Fluids when assigned to Ranch.

kelpsea-ignis.pe: While in party, increases Attack of Fire Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

kikit.pe: While in party, increases Defense of Ground Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

killamari.pe: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

killamari-primo.pe: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

kingpaca.pe: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by 5~14% for each Melpaca in party.

kingpaca-cryst.pe: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by 5~14% for each Melpaca in party.

kitsun.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take 15~30% less Ice damage and are immune to Freeze. (Does not stack)

kitsun-noct.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take 15~30% less Dark damage and are immune to Blind. (Does not stack)

knocklem.pe: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem's Attack by 50~200% and Defense by 50~200% for a limited time.

knocklem-ignis.pe: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem Ignis's Attack by 60~210% and Defense by 60~210% for a limited time.

lamball.pe: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

lapiron.pe: While in party, increases the player's Defense by 50~65% while sprinting. (Does not stack)

lapure.pe: While in party, reduces the Partner Skill cooldowns for other party Pals by 10~50%. (Does not stack)

leafan.pe: This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by 2~6% for each other Grass Pal in your party.

leezpunk.pe: When activated, Leezpunk and the player become invisible, making them undetectable to enemies for {ActiveSkillOverWriteEffectTime} seconds.

leezpunk-ignis.pe: When activated, Leezpunk Ignis and the player become invisible, making them undetectable to enemies for {ActiveSkillOverWriteEffectTime} seconds.

lifmunk.pe: When activated, leaps onto the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follows up player attacks.

loomen.pe: While in party, the player's arrows explode on contact, dealing additional damage equal to 15~30% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack)

loupmoon.pe: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Jumping Claw. When this Pal uses Jumping Claw, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed by 15~3

loupmoon-cryst.pe: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Snow Claw. When this Pal uses Snow Claw, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed by 15~30%. (D

lovander.pe: While fighting together, grants the player and Lovander a life steal effect that restores 5~9% of damage dealt as Health.

lullu.pe: While at a base, Lullu fills farms with good spirits, increasing the growth rate of the crops by 50~70%.

lunaris.pe: While in party, spheres home in on Pals, and carrying capacity increases by 300~600. (Does not stack)

lyleen.pe: When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the Health of the player and Party Pals by 80~90%.

lyleen-noct.pe: When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the Health of the player and Party Pals by 85~95%.

majex.pe: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Burn, the enemy creates flames around itself, dealing continuous damage equal to 15~30% of the player's attack damage to enemies that co

mammorest.pe: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by 220~500% and mining efficiency by 500~2000%.

mammorest-cryst.pe: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by 220~500% and mining efficiency by 500~2000%.

maraith.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, all Party Pals' Active Skill cooldowns are reduced by 30~60% whenever you defeat an enemy. (Does not stack)

mau.pe: Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to Ranch.

mau-cryst.pe: Sometimes drops Iceorgan when assigned to Ranch.

melpaca.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, increases Kingpaca's Defense and Movement Speed. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

menasting.pe: While in party, player's Defense increases by 5~10%, and Electric Pals drop 40~80% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

menasting-terra.pe: While in party, player's Defense increases by 5~10%, and Electric Pals drop 40~80% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

mimog.pe: While fighting together, Mimog can open treasure chests without using a key.

moldron.pe: Can be ridden as a mount. This Pal's Attack increases by 4~8% for each other Fire or Ground Pal in your party.

moldron-cryst.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Ice damage to enemy weak points by 25~40%. (Does not stack)

mossanda.pe: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.

mossanda-lux.pe: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.

mozzarina.pe: Sometimes drops Milk when assigned to Ranch.

muffly.pe: While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Freeze. (Does not stack)

munchill.pe: While in party, reduces the weight of ingredient and food by 30~60%. When paired with another Ice Pal, their Rot Speed also reduces by -80~-30%. (Does not stack)

mycora.pe: While at a base, increases the Medicine Production Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

necromus.pe: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. When Twin Spears skill is activated, a Paladius in your party will appear and attack alongside you.

needoll.pe: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Ivy-Covered by 50~65%. (Does not stack)

needoll-noct.pe: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Ivy-Covered 2~6. (Does not stack)

neptilius.pe: While in party, it follows up the player's attacks with Water spear strikes. Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, it can leap high into the air over water.

nitemary.pe: While fighting together, Pals drop +100~200% more Pal Souls when defeated. (Does not stack)

nitemary-botan.pe: While in party, increases Defense of Grass Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

nitewing.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount.

nox.pe: When activated, detects the location of nearby Pal Effigies.

nyafia.pe: When activated, Nyafia will fire a shotgun at nearby enemies for a limited time. While in party, increases the player's shotgun damage by 10~35%. (Does not stack)

omascul.pe: While in party, increases Party Pals' EXP gained by 40~80%. (Does not stack)

ophydia.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Soak 2~6. (Does not stack)

orserk.pe: While in party, hitting an enemy with a bullet increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by 1~5% for 5 seconds. This effect stacks up to 30 times. (Does not stack.)

paladius.pe: Can be ridden. Can triple jump while mounted. Activate Spear Thrust to have Necromus stay by your side and attack enemies in tandem.

palumba.pe: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by 155~240% while mounted on grass.

panthalus.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Only 1 can be summoned to a base. While at a base, it constantly patrols the skies and bombards intruders from high above.

pengullet.pe: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher to fire Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

pengullet-lux.pe: When activated, the player equips Pengullet Lux to fire Rocket Launcher as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

penking.pe: While in party, Fire Pals drop 40~80% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

penking-lux.pe: While in party, improves player's and Pals' Water damage to enemy weak points by 25~40%. (Does not stack)

petallia.pe: When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by 75~85%. While at a base, increases the Planting Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

petallia-ignis.pe: When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by 80~90%. While in party, player and party Pals take 15~30% less Grass damage, and are immune to Ivy-Covered. (Does not stack)

pierdon.pe: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Muddy by 50~65%. (Does not stack)

pierdon-cryst.pe: While in party, player and party Pals take 15~30% less Dragon damage. (Does not stack)

polapup.pe: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by 80~160% while mounted on snow. Can also slide quickly down slopes.

polapup-terra.pe: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by 80~160% while mounted on snow. Can also slide quickly down slopes. While it starts out slow, the top speed it can hit while sliding is no joke.

prixter.pe: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Poison by 50~65%. (Does not stack)

prixter-lux.pe: When activated, Prixter Lux changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by 30~50%.

prunelia.pe: While at a base, Prunelia's prayers bless the crops, increasing their harvest by 18~35%.

puffolt.pe: While at a base, increases the Generating Electricity Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

pupperai.pe: While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by 10~35%. (Does not stack)

purple-slime.pe: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

pyrin.pe: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by 5~20%.

pyrin-noct.pe: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Dark and increases Attack by 5~20%.
